actionUnits.condition: Scene MonoBehaviour settings match Fire script (GUID 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d). Config: isOn=0, timeToOnMin=40, timeToOnMax=60, timeToOn will be randomized in Awake; downMultiplier=2; totalHitTime=5; onNeighborsThreshold=2; mainEffectGo fileID=1849464941111748095; BoxCollider enabled (m_IsTrigger=0); Has_Rigidbody=false; no UnityEvent m_Calls defined. Fire has no public parameterless methods, so no direct method calls can be triggered by this plan. This trigger step simply advances time to observe Update behavior with current config (no neighbors and no water hits) — expected: no state change. To achieve full coverage, we need a way to invoke WaterHit(Vector3) and to simulate neighbor notifications via NotifyNeighborState(bool) or FindNeighbors(...).
